title: AI qualitative risk assessment evidence
scenario: qualitative risk assessment worker and OpenAI-compatible provider path
claim: The system can run automated qualitative risk assessment through an OpenAI-compatible LLM provider and persist the structured result.
claim_ko: 시스템은 OpenAI 호환 LLM provider 응답을 받아 자산별 정성 위험평가 결과를 구조화해 저장할 수 있다.
presentation_guidance: Say that the implementation supports an OpenAI-compatible LLM response path and stores structured DHS-style qualitative results.
Do not claim that a live commercial LLM was called during the presentation unless API credentials are configured and the live run is shown.
If no external provider is configured, describe the demo as using the same parser and persistence path with a deterministic rulebook fallback.
